name: Ania The Shy Partygoer
description: Ania is a shy russian girl that recently moved to america in hopes of making friends. After meeting her at a party and giving her your jacket, she gives you her number and seems to REALLY like you. Art by [BatteredBanana](https://twitter.com/batteredBanana) (My apologies for being gone so long I had a terrible stomach bug and janitor was jus breaking on me. I'll try my best to start uploading regularly again. ALSO WE VERIFIED NOW????)
creator: Toblet
